channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: State AGs Seek Temporary Restraining Order To Pause Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery Merger - Deadline
item.description:
1. State AGs Seek Temporary Restraining Order To Pause Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery Merger  Deadline
  2. AGs sue to block Warner Bros., Paramount merger  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
  3. Paramount still plans to close WBD merger by end of September despite lawsuit  CNBC
  4. Ellison’s California Nightmare  status.news
  5. US state officials fear Paramount-Warner deal will squeeze local movie theaters  Reuters

item.title: Wall Street Banks Set to Pull in Almost $39 Billion From Trading - Yahoo Finance

item.title: Goodbye, middle seat. United's new seating design offers extra space - USA Today
item.description:
1. Goodbye, middle seat. United's new seating design offers extra space  USA Today
  2. United Airlines' new upsell: Keeping other travelers out of the middle seat  CNBC
  3. United Airlines Announces New Economy Plus Option that Turns Middle Seat Into a Shared Table  People.com
  4. United Airlines to Roll Out New Economy Row With Extra Legroom  Bloomberg.com
  5. United Airlines is replacing some of its middle seats with this new amenity  WAVY.com

item.title: Tyler Herro wants to 'move on' from Bam Adebayo altercation - ESPN

item.title: ‘If we die, we die together’: wife of Ryanair passenger almost sucked through window speaks - The Guardian
item.description:
1. ‘If we die, we die together’: wife of Ryanair passenger almost sucked through window speaks  The Guardian
  2. Wife of man ‘sucked out of Ryanair flight’ describes horrifying ordeal  The Independent
  3. 'If we die, we die together': Wife of passenger sucked out of plane window describes ordeal  Sky News
  4. Wife Saved Her Husband from Being Sucked Out of Plane at 20,000ft  Wide Open Country
  5. Ryanair passengers jammed case into smashed jet window but it was sucked out  the-sun.com

item.title: Andy Serkis defends lack of diversity in Lord of the Rings cast - BBC
item.description:
1. Andy Serkis defends lack of diversity in Lord of the Rings cast  BBC
  2. Director of new ‘Lord of the Rings’ rejects ‘politically correct’ casting after suggestions film is too White  Fox News
  3. Andy Serkis Defends 'Hunt for Gollum' Cast Amid Diversity Criticism  The Hollywood Reporter
  4. Andy Serkis Responds To Question About Lack Of Diversity In ‘LOTR: The Hunt For Gollum’ Casting  Deadline
  5. Andy Serkis on Animal Farm, The Hunt for Gollum, AI and Motion-Capture  Variety
